items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to 'Notification delivery failure handling'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how notification delivery failures are handled or reported. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or identify any gaps in the implementation.
